title: Dante e la Selva Oscura
englishTitle: Dante and the Dark Forest (Inferno, Canto 1-2)

lines.english: Dante is thirty-five years old.

lines.italian: È nel mezzo della sua vita.
lines.english: He is in the middle of his life.

lines.italian: Un giorno, si sveglia in un bosco.
lines.english: One day, he wakes up in a forest.
The forest is dark.
He is afraid.
He does not know where he is.

lines.italian: Non ricorda come è arrivato qui.
lines.english: He does not remember how he got here.
"Where am I?" says Dante.

lines.italian: Guarda in alto e vede una montagna.
lines.english: He looks up and sees a mountain.
The sun shines on the top.
"I must climb that mountain," thinks Dante.

lines.italian: Comincia a camminare verso la montagna.
lines.english: He starts to walk toward the mountain.

lines.italian: Ma un animale blocca la strada.
lines.english: But an animal blocks the road.

lines.italian: È una lonza. Un grande gatto selvatico.
lines.english: It is a leopard. A big wild cat.

lines.italian: La lonza è veloce e pericolosa.
lines.english: The leopard is fast and dangerous.

lines.italian: Dante ha paura ma continua a camminare.
lines.english: Dante is afraid but keeps walking.
Then he sees a lion.

lines.italian: Il leone è grande e forte.
lines.english: The lion is big and strong.
It raises its head and roars.
Dante trembles.
Then a she-wolf arrives.

lines.italian: La lupa è magra e ha fame.
lines.english: The she-wolf is thin and hungry.
Her eyes are terrible.
Dante cannot go forward.
He goes back into the dark forest.
"I am lost," says Dante.
But then he sees a man.
"Who are you?" asks Dante.
"I am Virgil," says the man.

lines.italian: "Sono un poeta. Sono morto molto tempo fa."
lines.english: "I am a poet. I died a long time ago."
"Why are you here?" asks Dante.

lines.italian: "Una donna mi ha mandato. Il suo nome è Beatrice."
lines.english: "A woman sent me. Her name is Beatrice."
"Beatrice!" says Dante. "My love!"

lines.italian: "Beatrice ti guarda dal cielo," dice Virgilio.
lines.english: "Beatrice watches you from heaven," says Virgil.
"She is afraid for you."
"You must come with me," says Virgil.
"There is another road to the mountain."
"But first we must pass through Hell."
"Hell?" says Dante. "I am afraid."

lines.italian: "Non avere paura," dice Virgilio. "Io sono con te."
lines.english: "Do not be afraid," says Virgil. "I am with you."
They walk together in the forest.

lines.italian: Arrivano davanti a una grande porta.
lines.english: They arrive in front of a great gate.
On the gate it is written:
"Abandon all hope, you who enter."
Dante reads and trembles.
"Courage," says Virgil.

lines.italian: Virgilio prende la mano di Dante.
lines.english: Virgil takes Dante's hand.
They enter through the gate together.
The journey through Hell begins.
